description: Create a new EE ALGA plan for the external workflow schedules redesign without overwriting the prior inline time-trigger plan
Change workflow schedule persistence from one-schedule-per-workflow to many-schedules-per-workflow
Add required schedule name storage to the workflow schedule model
Add static payload_json storage to the workflow schedule model
Preserve workflow_version binding on each schedule and update it when the latest published version changes
Add schedule CRUD persistence helpers for list, get, create, update, and delete operations
Add server actions for listing schedules in a global Automation Hub screen
Add server actions for creating schedules for published workflows
Add server actions for editing existing schedules including timing and payload changes
Add pause and resume actions for existing schedules
Add delete actions that remove both schedule persistence and runner registration state
Require workflows to have a published version before schedules can be created
Restrict schedule creation and editing to workflows with pinned payload schemas
Validate saved schedule payload_json against the workflow payload schema on create
Validate saved schedule payload_json against the workflow payload schema on edit
Revalidate all schedules when a workflow publishes a new latest version
Automatically rebind valid schedules to the latest published workflow version
Preserve invalid schedules after publish and mark them non-runnable with validation errors
Update scheduled job handlers to launch workflows with the saved schedule payload instead of the fixed clock payload contract
Keep schedule provenance metadata on workflow runs even though input_json comes from the saved static schedule payload
Add a new Automation Hub Schedules tab and menu entry under the Automation Hub parent menu
Build a global schedules list with workflow, trigger type, status, next fire or run-at, last fire, and error visibility
Add filtering and search on the schedules list for workflow, status, trigger type, and text query
Add row-level actions for edit, pause/resume, and delete on the schedules list
Build a schedule create/edit dialog with workflow picker, schedule name, trigger type, and timing inputs
Support one-time schedule entry using a runAt picker in the schedule dialog
Support recurring schedule entry using 5-field cron plus timezone in the schedule dialog
Reuse the existing workflow run dialog schema-driven form mode for schedule payload authoring
Reuse the existing workflow run dialog JSON mode for schedule payload authoring
Show inline payload validation errors in the schedule dialog and block save when invalid
Reduce workflow editor trigger options to No trigger and Event
Remove inline one-time and recurring schedule authoring panels from the workflow editor
Keep no-trigger workflows manually runnable after schedule authoring moves خارج of the workflow editor
Keep event-trigger configuration and mapping behavior unchanged in the workflow editor
Add workflow-context navigation into the global schedules screen prefiltered to the current workflow
Gate schedule CRUD by existing workflow management permissions and tenant scope
